## File: packages/renderer/src/screens/LockscreenView.tsx
````typescript
import React from "react";
import { Notification } from "@tokovo/core";
import { LayoutState, LockscreenLayoutState } from "@tokovo/core";

/**
 * iOS 17/18 Lockscreen View
 * - Ultra-thin clock (font-weight: 100)
 * - Single-line date
 * - Notifications stacked at bottom
 * - App logo icons in notifications
 */

// APP_LOGOS Removed. Using AppMetadataRegistry.

interface LockscreenViewProps {
    notifications?: Notification[];
    layout?: LayoutState;
    variant?: "ios" | "android";
    time?: string;
    date?: string;
}

export const LockscreenView: React.FC<LockscreenViewProps> = ({
    notifications = [],
    layout,
    variant = "ios",
    time = "9:41",
    date
}) => {
    const isAndroid = variant === "android";
    const lockscreenLayout = layout?.kind === "LOCKSCREEN" ? (layout as LockscreenLayoutState) : null;
    const displayDate = date || formatDate();

    const activeNotifications = notifications.filter(n => {
        if (n.dismissedAt !== undefined) return false;
        const mode = n.mode || "both";
        return mode === "lockscreen" || mode === "both";
    });

    return (
        <div style={{
            position: "absolute",
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            background: "linear-gradient(180deg, #000000 0%, #1C1C1E 100%)",
            display: "flex",
            flexDirection: "column",
            fontFamily: "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif",
            color: "white"
        }}>
            {/* Time Display - iOS 17 style ultra-thin */}
            <div style={{
                marginTop: 300,
                textAlign: "center"
            }}>
                <div style={{
                    fontSize: 300,
                    fontWeight: 100,  // Ultra-thin
                    letterSpacing: -12,
                    lineHeight: 0.9,
                    fontVariantNumeric: "tabular-nums"
                }}>
                    {time}
                </div>
                <div style={{
                    marginTop: 12,
                    fontSize: 54,
                    fontWeight: 500,
                    opacity: 0.9,
                    letterSpacing: 0
                }}>
                    {displayDate}
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* Spacer */}
            <div style={{ flex: 1 }} />

            {/* iOS 16+ Notifications - Bottom Stack */}
            {activeNotifications.length > 0 && (
                <div style={{
                    paddingBottom: 270,
                    paddingLeft: 48,
                    paddingRight: 48
                }}>
                    {activeNotifications.slice(-3).reverse().map((notification, index) => {
                        const nl = lockscreenLayout?.notificationLayouts.find(l => l.id === notification.id);
                        const opacity = nl?.opacity ?? 1;
                        const translateY = nl?.translateY ?? 0;
                        const stackOffset = index * 15;
                        const stackScale = 1 - (index * 0.02);

                        return (
                            <div
                                key={notification.id}
                                style={{
                                    marginBottom: index === 0 ? 0 : -120,
                                    opacity: opacity * (1 - index * 0.2),
                                    transform: `translateY(${translateY + stackOffset}px) scale(${stackScale})`,
                                    transformOrigin: "bottom center",
                                    zIndex: 10 - index
                                }}
                            >
                                <NotificationCard notification={notification} variant={variant} />
                            </div>
                        );
                    })}

                    {activeNotifications.length > 3 && (
                        <div style={{
                            textAlign: "center",
                            marginTop: 30,
                            fontSize: 36,
                            opacity: 0.5
                        }}>
                            +{activeNotifications.length - 3} more
                        </div>
                    )}
                </div>
            )}

            {/* Bottom Buttons */}
            <div style={{
                position: "absolute",
                bottom: 0,
                left: 0,
                right: 0,
                height: 270,
                display: "flex",
                justifyContent: "space-between",
                alignItems: "center",
                padding: "0 60px"
            }}>
                {!isAndroid && (
                    <>
                        <LockscreenButton icon="flashlight" />
                        <LockscreenButton icon="camera" />
                    </>
                )}
            </div>

            {/* Home Indicator */}
            <div style={{
                position: "absolute",
                bottom: 24,
                left: "50%",
                transform: "translateX(-50%)",
                width: 405,
                height: 15,
                backgroundColor: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)",
                borderRadius: 15
            }} />
        </div>
    );
};

/**
 * Lockscreen control button
 */
const LockscreenButton: React.FC<{ icon: "flashlight" | "camera" }> = ({ icon }) => (
    <div style={{
        width: 150,
        height: 150,
        borderRadius: "50%",
        backgroundColor: "rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)",
        backdropFilter: "blur(20px)",
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "center"
    }}>
        {icon === "flashlight" ? (
            <svg width="54" height="54" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white">
                <path d="M9 2h6v6l2 2v12H7V10l2-2V2zm2 2v4h2V4h-2zm-1 7.5v8h4v-8l-2-2-2 2z" />
            </svg>
        ) : (
            <svg width="54" height="54" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white">
                <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" stroke="white" strokeWidth="2" fill="none" />
                <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4" fill="white" />
            </svg>
        )}
    </div>
);

/**
 * Notification Card with app icon
 */
const NotificationCard: React.FC<{
    notification: Notification; // Is actually NotificationInstance
    variant?: "ios" | "android";
}> = ({ notification, variant = "ios" }) => {
    const ir = notification.ir;
    if (!ir) return null; // Safety check

    // Decoupled: Use Registry
    // Since this is a React component, we might need to handle the case where "icon" is a string or component.
    // Ideally we pass it as a prop or context, but for now we look it up.
    // Note: In strict React, side-effect imports inside render are bad, but this is a static registry.
    const { AppMetadataRegistry } = require("@tokovo/core");
    const meta = AppMetadataRegistry.get(ir.appId);

    const appIcon = typeof meta.icon === "string" ? (
        <div style={{
            width: 66,
            height: 66,
            borderRadius: 15,
            background: meta.themeColor || "#8E8E93",
            display: "flex",
            alignItems: "center",
            justifyContent: "center",
            fontSize: 30,
            color: "white"
        }}>{meta.icon}</div>
    ) : (
        // It's a React Node (SVG)
        meta.icon
    );

    const appName = meta.displayName || "APP";

    return (
        <div style={{
            backgroundColor: "rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.8)",
            backdropFilter: "blur(60px)",
            WebkitBackdropFilter: "blur(60px)",
            borderRadius: 54,
            padding: "36px 42px",
            color: "white"
        }}>
            {/* Header */}
            <div style={{
                display: "flex",
                alignItems: "center",
                gap: 18,
                marginBottom: 15
            }}>
                {appIcon}
                <span style={{
                    fontSize: 30,
                    opacity: 0.6,
                    fontWeight: 600,
                    letterSpacing: 1.5
                }}>
                    {appName.toUpperCase()}
                </span>
                <span style={{ marginLeft: "auto", fontSize: 27, opacity: 0.4 }}>
                    now
                </span>
            </div>

            {/* Content */}
            <div style={{ fontSize: 45, fontWeight: 600, marginBottom: 9 }}>
                {ir.title}
            </div>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 42, opacity: 0.9, lineHeight: 1.35 }}>
                {ir.body}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

/**
 * Format date
 */
function formatDate(): string {
    const days = ["Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday"];
    const months = ["January", "February", "March", "April", "May", "June",
        "July", "August", "September", "October", "November", "December"];
    const now = new Date();
    return `${days[now.getDay()]}, ${months[now.getMonth()]} ${now.getDate()}`;
}
````

## File: turbo/generators/episode/templates/episode.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ title }}
*
* Generated by: pnpm turbo gen episode
* Category: {{ category }}
* Format: {{ format }}
*
* @see packages/episodes/README.md
*/

import { defineEpisode } from "../types/episode-definition";
import { episode } from "@tokovo/dsl/src/v2";
{{#if hasWhatsApp}}
import { WhatsAppTrackBuilder } from "@tokovo/apps-whatsapp/src/dsl/track-builder";
{{/if}}

// Declaration order counter (required for event ordering)
let order = 0;
const getOrder = () => order++;

export default defineEpisode({
meta: {
id: "{{ id }}",
title: "{{ title }}",
description: "{{ description }}",
category: "{{ category }}",
tags: [{{#each tags}}"{{this}}"{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}],
},
config: {
format: "{{ format }}",
durationInFrames: {{ durationInFrames }},
apps: [{{#each apps}}"{{this}}"{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}],
},
build: () => episode("{{ id }}", {
fps: {{ fps }},
duration: "{{ duration }}",
title: "{{ title }}",
})
.device("phone", "iphone16", {
{{#if hasWhatsApp}}
app: "app_whatsapp",
conversations: [
{ id: "dm_contact", name: "Contact", avatar: "" },
],
{{/if}}
})

{{#if hasWhatsApp}}
// === WHATSAPP TRACK ===
.track("app_whatsapp",
() => new WhatsAppTrackBuilder({{ fps }}, "phone", "dm_contact", getOrder),
wa => {
// Add your WhatsApp events here:
wa.at("1s").receive("Contact", "Hello! 👋");
wa.span("3s", "5s").typing("me");
wa.at("5s").send("Hi there! How are you?");
wa.at("7s").receive("Contact", "I'm great, thanks!");
}
)
{{/if}}

// === CAMERA TRACK (optional) ===
.camera(cam => {
cam.at("5s").animate({ scale: 1.05, duration: "0.3s" });
cam.at("10s").animate({ scale: 1, duration: "0.5s" });
})

// === AUDIO TRACK (optional) ===
.audio(audio => {
// audio.span("0s", "{{ duration }}").bgm("ambient", { volume: 0.1 });
})

// === MARKERS (optional) ===
.mark("start", "0s")

.build(),
});
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/camera/director.ts.hbs

/**
* {{ displayName }} Camera Director
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

export const {{ pascalCase name }}Director = {
appId: "app_{{ snakeCase name }}",

handleEvent(event: any): any | null {
// Return camera intents based on events
switch (event.type) {
case "MESSAGE_RECEIVED":
case "MESSAGE_SENT":
return { type: "FOCUS", target: event.payload?.messageId };
default:
return null;
}
},
};

export const {{ pascalCase name }}Behavior = {
appId: "app_{{ snakeCase name }}",
behaviors: [
{ eventType: "MESSAGE_RECEIVED", intent: "FOCUS" },
{ eventType: "MESSAGE_SENT", intent: "FOCUS" },
{ eventType: "TYPING_START", intent: "PAN" },
],
};
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/config/layout-config.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} Layout Configuration
*
* WHAT THIS FILE DOES:
* - Defines pixel-perfect heights, widths, spacing for all message types
* - Provides deterministic layout calculation (no runtime DOM measurement)
* - Source of truth for both Layout Engine and React Components
*
* HOW TO THINK ABOUT IT:
* - "Pure Math" philosophy: No heuristics, no multipliers
* - All values in DEVICE pixels (3x for retina)
* - React components use LOGICAL pixels (divide by 3)
* - AppSurface bridges the gap with CSS transform: scale(3)
*
* WHY IT MATTERS FOR DSL:
* - Layout is computed from WorldState at each frame
* - DSL events → Reducer → WorldState → Layout → Render
* - This config ensures layout is deterministic and frame-accurate
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
* @see WhatsApp's layout-config.ts for production example (594 lines)
*/

// =============================================================================
// MESSAGE TYPE ENUMERATION
// =============================================================================

/**
* All message types your plugin supports.
*
* EXAMPLE: Add new types as needed:
* ```
* export type MessageType = "text" | "image" | "poll" | "location";
* ```
*/
export type MessageType =
| "text"
| "image"
| "video"
| "voice"
| "system"
| "typing";

export type MessageCategory = "text" | "media" | "audio" | "system" | "ephemeral";

// =============================================================================
// LAYOUT CONSTANTS (Source of Truth)
// =============================================================================

/**
* These values are in DEVICE PIXELS (3x retina).
*
* EXAMPLE: LINE_HEIGHT of 66 = 22px visible on screen
*
* WHY DEVICE PIXELS?
* - Ensures crisp rendering at export resolution
* - Layout engine works in physical pixels
* - AppSurface scales CSS to match
*/
export const LAYOUT_CONSTANTS = {
// Typography
BUBBLE_PADDING_V: 24, // Top/Bottom padding (8px visible)
BUBBLE_PADDING_H: 36, // Left/Right padding (12px visible)
LINE_HEIGHT: 66, // Text line height (22px visible)
FONT_SIZE: 51, // Text font size (17px visible)
TIMESTAMP_HEIGHT: 36, // Footer area (12px visible)

// Spacing Tiers (The Gap System)
GAP_MINIMAL: 24, // Same sender, burst mode (8px)
GAP_RUN_BREAK: 36, // Same sender, new block (12px)
GAP_NORMAL: 48, // Different senders (16px)
GAP_SYSTEM: 36, // Around system messages (12px)

// Measurement
AVG_CHAR_WIDTH: 26, // Average character width for wrapping

// Typing Indicator
TYPING_BUBBLE_HEIGHT: 72,
TYPING_BUBBLE_PADDING_V: 27,
};

/**
* UI Constants for header, input, etc.
*/
export const UI_CONSTANTS = {
HEADER_CONTENT_HEIGHT: 60,
HEADER_AVATAR_SIZE: 37,
INPUT_MIN_HEIGHT: 60,
};

// =============================================================================
// DEFAULT CONFIGURATION
// =============================================================================

/**
* Complete layout configuration.
*
* HOW TO CUSTOMIZE:
* 1. Override specific values in your feature
* 2. Pass custom config to computeLayout()
* 3. Values merge with defaults
*/
export const DEFAULT_LAYOUT_CONFIG = {
messageTypes: {
text: {
height: {
base: LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.BUBBLE_PADDING_V * 2 + LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.TIMESTAMP_HEIGHT,
lineHeight: LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.LINE_HEIGHT,
},
width: { maxPercent: 0.78, min: 150 },
},
image: {
height: { base: 600, withCaption: 700 },
width: { maxPercent: 0.78, min: 300 },
},
video: {
height: { base: 600, withCaption: 700 },
width: { maxPercent: 0.78, min: 300 },
},
voice: {
height: { base: 180 },
width: { fixed: 450, maxPercent: 0.78, min: 450 },
},
system: {
height: { base: 80 },
width: { maxPercent: 0.6, min: 200 },
},
typing: {
height: { base: LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.TYPING_BUBBLE_HEIGHT + (LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.TYPING_BUBBLE_PADDING_V * 2) },
width: { fixed: 150, maxPercent: 0.3, min: 150 },
},
},
additions: {
reaction: 36,
reply: 90,
linkPreview: 180,
senderName: 45,
},
scroll: {
lockToBottom: true,
smoothScrollDuration: 15,
easing: "easeOut",
},
animation: {
messageAppearDuration: 12, // frames
messageAppearOffset: 30, // pixels
},
spacing: {
topPadding: 48,
bottomPadding: 120,
bubbleMargin: 36,
},
};

// =============================================================================
// HELPER FUNCTIONS
// =============================================================================

/**
* Calculate smart gap between messages.
*
* THE GAP ALGORITHM:
* 1. System messages always use GAP_SYSTEM
* 2. Same sender + same type + no attachments = GAP_MINIMAL (burst)
* 3. Same sender + different block = GAP_RUN_BREAK
* 4. Different senders = GAP_NORMAL
*
* WHY THIS MATTERS:
* - Creates natural "visual runs" like real messaging apps
* - Deterministic: same input = same output
*/
export function calculateGap(prev: { type: string; from: string }, next: { type: string; from: string }): number {
// System messages always have system gap
if (prev.type === "system" || next.type === "system") {
return LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.GAP_SYSTEM;
}

// Same sender, same type = burst (minimal gap)
if (prev.from === next.from && prev.type === next.type) {
return LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.GAP_MINIMAL;
}

// Same sender, different block = run break
if (prev.from === next.from) {
return LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.GAP_RUN_BREAK;
}

// Different senders = normal gap
return LAYOUT_CONSTANTS.GAP_NORMAL;
}

export type { MessageType as LayoutMessageType };
````

/**
* {{ displayName }} Theme Configuration
*
* WHAT THIS FILE DOES:
* - Defines semantic color tokens
* - Provides consistent theming across iOS/Android
* - Enables custom themes (dark mode, Ghibli, etc.)
*
* HOW TO THINK ABOUT IT:
* - Semantic names: "bubbleMy" not "green"
* - Platform-agnostic: strategies map to native
* - Extensible: new themes implement same interface
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

// =============================================================================
// COLOR PALETTE
// =============================================================================

/**
* Raw colors - brand and utility.
* Use semantic tokens (below) in components.
*/
export const COLORS = {
// Brand
primary: "{{ themeColor }}",
secondary: "#128C7E",

// Backgrounds
white: "#FFFFFF",
black: "#000000",
gray50: "#F5F5F5",
gray100: "#E5E5E5",
gray200: "#CCCCCC",
gray500: "#808080",
gray800: "#333333",
gray900: "#1A1A1A",

// Semantic
success: "#25D366",
warning: "#FFC107",
error: "#FF3B30",
info: "#007AFF",
};

// =============================================================================
// THEME INTERFACE
// =============================================================================

/**
* Theme tokens used by UI components.
* All strategies (iOS, Android, custom) must provide these.
*/
export interface {{ pascalCase name }}Theme {
// App
backgroundColor: string;

// Bubbles
bubbleMyBg: string;
bubbleMyText: string;
bubbleOtherBg: string;
bubbleOtherText: string;

// Typography
textPrimary: string;
textSecondary: string;
textMuted: string;

// UI Elements
headerBg: string;
headerText: string;
inputBg: string;
inputPlaceholder: string;
divider: string;

// Accent
accent: string;
accentLight: string;

// Typography
fontFamily: string;
}

// =============================================================================
// DEFAULT THEMES
// =============================================================================

/**
* Light theme (default).
*/
export const LIGHT_THEME: {{ pascalCase name }}Theme = {
backgroundColor: "#ECE5DD",

bubbleMyBg: "{{ themeColor }}",
bubbleMyText: "#FFFFFF",
bubbleOtherBg: "#FFFFFF",
bubbleOtherText: "#000000",

textPrimary: "#000000",
textSecondary: "#667781",
textMuted: "#8696A0",

headerBg: "#FFFFFF",
headerText: "#000000",
inputBg: "#F0F0F0",
inputPlaceholder: "#8696A0",
divider: "#E9EDEF",

accent: "{{ themeColor }}",
accentLight: "{{ themeColor }}20",

fontFamily: "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif",
};

/**
* Dark theme.
*/
export const DARK_THEME: {{ pascalCase name }}Theme = {
backgroundColor: "#0B141A",

bubbleMyBg: "{{ themeColor }}",
bubbleMyText: "#FFFFFF",
bubbleOtherBg: "#202C33",
bubbleOtherText: "#E9EDEF",

textPrimary: "#E9EDEF",

accentLight: "{{ themeColor }}30",

fontFamily: "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif",
};

// =============================================================================
// ACTIVE THEME
// =============================================================================

/**
* Currently active theme.
*
* HOW TO SWITCH THEMES:
* ```typescript
* import { setActiveTheme, DARK_THEME } from "./theme";
* setActiveTheme(DARK_THEME);
* ```
*/
let activeTheme: {{ pascalCase name }}Theme = LIGHT_THEME;

export function getActiveTheme(): {{ pascalCase name }}Theme {
return activeTheme;
}

export function setActiveTheme(theme: {{ pascalCase name }}Theme): void {
activeTheme = theme;
}

export { COLORS };
````

/**
* {{ displayName }} DSL Extension
*
* b.use("app_{{ snakeCase name }}") API for beat DSL.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

const APP_ID = "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";

export interface {{ pascalCase name }}DslApi {
receive(from: string, text: string): void;
send(text: string): void;
typingStart(from: string): void;
typingEnd(from: string): void;
}

export const {{ camelCase name }}Dsl = {
id: APP_ID,

create(ctx: any): {{ pascalCase name }}DslApi {
return {
receive(from: string, text: string) {
ctx.addEvent({
at: ctx.currentFrame,
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "MESSAGE_RECEIVED",
payload: { from, text, conversationId: ctx.conversationId },
});
},

send(text: string) {
ctx.addEvent({
at: ctx.currentFrame,
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "MESSAGE_SENT",
payload: { text, conversationId: ctx.conversationId },
});
},

typingStart(from: string) {
ctx.addEvent({
at: ctx.currentFrame,
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "TYPING_START",
payload: { actor: from, conversationId: ctx.conversationId },
});
},

typingEnd(from: string) {
ctx.addEvent({
at: ctx.currentFrame,
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "TYPING_END",
payload: { actor: from, conversationId: ctx.conversationId },
});
},
};
},
};
````

````
/**
* {{ displayName }} Track Builder
*
* V2 DSL for authoring {{ displayName }} episodes.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

const APP_ID = "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";

export interface ReceiveOptions {
from: string;
text: string;
conversationId?: string;
}

export interface SendOptions {
text: string;
conversationId?: string;
}

export interface TypingOptions {
from: string;
conversationId?: string;
}

export class {{ pascalCase name }}TrackBuilder {
private builder: any;
private defaultConversationId = "conv_1";

constructor(builder: any, conversationId?: string) {
this.builder = builder;
if (conversationId) this.defaultConversationId = conversationId;
}

at(frame: number): {{ pascalCase name }}PointBuilder {
return new {{ pascalCase name }}PointBuilder(this.builder, frame, this.defaultConversationId);
}
}

export class {{ pascalCase name }}PointBuilder {
private builder: any;
private frame: number;
private conversationId: string;

constructor(builder: any, frame: number, conversationId: string) {
this.builder = builder;
this.frame = frame;
this.conversationId = conversationId;
}

receive(opts: ReceiveOptions): this {
this.builder.track("app").point(this.frame, {
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "MESSAGE_RECEIVED",
payload: {
from: opts.from,
text: opts.text,
conversationId: opts.conversationId || this.conversationId,
messageId: `msg_${this.frame}_${opts.from}`,
},
});
return this;
}

send(opts: SendOptions): this {
this.builder.track("app").point(this.frame, {
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "MESSAGE_SENT",
payload: {
text: opts.text,
conversationId: opts.conversationId || this.conversationId,
messageId: `msg_${this.frame}_me`,
},
});
return this;
}

typingStart(opts: TypingOptions): this {
this.builder.track("app").point(this.frame, {
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "TYPING_START",
payload: {
actor: opts.from,
conversationId: opts.conversationId || this.conversationId,
},
});
return this;
}

typingEnd(opts: TypingOptions): this {
this.builder.track("app").point(this.frame, {
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
type: "TYPING_END",
payload: {
actor: opts.from,
conversationId: opts.conversationId || this.conversationId,
},
});
return this;
}
}

export function create{{ pascalCase name }}TrackBuilder(builder: any, conversationId?: string): {{ pascalCase name
}}TrackBuilder {
return new {{ pascalCase name }}TrackBuilder(builder, conversationId);
}
````

/**
* {{ displayName }} IR Payloads
*
* Discriminated union types for type-safe event handling.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

// =============================================================================
// PAYLOADS
// =============================================================================

export interface {{ pascalCase name }}Payloads {
MESSAGE_RECEIVED: { from: string; text: string; conversationId: string; messageId: string };
MESSAGE_SENT: { text: string; conversationId: string; messageId: string };
TYPING_START: { conversationId: string; actor: string };
TYPING_END: { conversationId: string; actor: string };
IMAGE_RECEIVED: { from: string; url: string; conversationId: string };
IMAGE_SENT: { url: string; conversationId: string };
}

// =============================================================================
// TYPE GUARDS
// =============================================================================

export function is{{ pascalCase name }}Event(e: { kind: string; appId?: string }): boolean {
return e.kind === "APP" && e.appId === "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";
}

// =============================================================================
// TRACK EVENT TYPE
// =============================================================================

export type {{ pascalCase name }}TrackEvent = {
kind: "APP";
appId: "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";
deviceId: string;
at: number;
} & (
| { type: "MESSAGE_RECEIVED"; payload: {{ pascalCase name }}Payloads["MESSAGE_RECEIVED"] }
| { type: "MESSAGE_SENT"; payload: {{ pascalCase name }}Payloads["MESSAGE_SENT"] }
| { type: "TYPING_START"; payload: {{ pascalCase name }}Payloads["TYPING_START"] }
| { type: "TYPING_END"; payload: {{ pascalCase name }}Payloads["TYPING_END"] }
);
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/layout/chat.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} Layout Computation
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import { LayoutContext, ChatLayoutState } from "@tokovo/core";

export function computeChatLayout(ctx: LayoutContext): ChatLayoutState {
const { world, activeConversationId, viewportHeight } = ctx;

if (!activeConversationId || !world.conversations[activeConversationId]) {
return {
kind: "CHAT",
scrollY: 0,
contentHeight: 0,
isAtBottom: true,
messageLayouts: {},
};
}

const conversation = world.conversations[activeConversationId] as any;
const messages = conversation.messages || [];
const messageLayouts: Record<string, any> = {};
    let currentY = 20; // Top padding

    for (const msg of messages) {
    const height = 60; // Base message height
    messageLayouts[msg.id] = {
    id: msg.id,
    y: currentY,
    height,
    opacity: 1,
    };
    currentY += height + 8; // Height + gap
    }

    const contentHeight = currentY + 20; // Bottom padding
    const scrollY = Math.max(0, contentHeight - viewportHeight);

    return {
    kind: "CHAT",
    scrollY,
    contentHeight,
    isAtBottom: true,
    messageLayouts,
    };
    }
````

/**
* {{ displayName }} V2 Lowering Handler
*
* Converts IR Track Events to Runtime Events.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import type { RuntimeEvent } from "@tokovo/core/src/types/runtime-event";

const APP_ID = "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";

export interface V2LoweringHandler {
lower(event: any): RuntimeEvent[];
}

export const {{ camelCase name }}V2Lowering: V2LoweringHandler = {
lower(event: any): RuntimeEvent[] {
if (event.appId !== APP_ID) return [];

return [{
at: event.at,
kind: "APP",
appId: APP_ID,
deviceId: event.deviceId,
type: event.type,
payload: event.payload || {},
conversationId: event.payload?.conversationId || event.conversationId,
}] as RuntimeEvent[];
}
};
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/runtime/adapters/anchors.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} Anchor Provider
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* WHAT ARE ANCHORS?
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* Anchors are NAMED REGIONS that the camera system can target.
* Think of them as "bookmarks" in your layout that the camera can focus on.
*
* EXAMPLES:
* - "lastMessage" → The most recent message bubble
* - "profile" → The profile avatar in the header
* - "typing" → The typing indicator
* - "input" → The input area
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* HOW ANCHORS WORK
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* 1. LAYOUT ENGINE computes positions and emits "semantic regions"
* 2. ANCHOR PROVIDER maps regions to named anchors
* 3. CAMERA SYSTEM uses anchors to compute zoom/pan
*
* ```
* Layout Engine Anchor Provider Camera
* ┌───────────┐ ┌───────────────┐ ┌──────────┐
* │ regions: │ ─────► │ getAnchors() │ ────► │ FOCUS on │
* │ msg_123 │ │ → lastMessage │ │ anchor │
* └───────────┘ └───────────────┘ └──────────┘
* ```
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* HOW TO THINK ABOUT ANCHORS
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* 1. SEMANTIC NAMES: Use meaningful names, not IDs
* - Good: "lastMessage", "typing", "profile"
* - Bad: "msg_1234", "div_45"
*
* 2. STABLE: Anchors should exist consistently
* - "header" always exists
* - "lastMessage" exists if there are messages
*
* 3. FRAMING: Each anchor has focus parameters
* - anchorPoint: Where in the region to center (0-1)
* - paddingPx: Margin around the region
* - targetFill: How much of screen the region should fill
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import type { ChatLayoutState } from "@tokovo/core";

const APP_ID = "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";

// =============================================================================
// ANCHOR FRAMING
// =============================================================================

/**
* Framing parameters for each anchor type.
*
* These define HOW the camera frames the anchor:
* - anchorPoint: Focus point within the region (x: 0-1, y: 0-1)
* - paddingPx: Padding around the region in pixels
* - targetFill: Target percentage of screen the region should occupy
*/
export const ANCHOR_FRAMING = {
message: {
anchorPoint: { x: 0.5, y: 0.5 }, // Center of bubble
paddingPx: 40,
targetFill: 0.6,
},
message_me: {
anchorPoint: { x: 0.6, y: 0.5 }, // Slightly right
paddingPx: 40,
targetFill: 0.6,
},
message_other: {
anchorPoint: { x: 0.4, y: 0.5 }, // Slightly left
paddingPx: 40,
targetFill: 0.6,
},
typing: {
anchorPoint: { x: 0.35, y: 0.5 },
paddingPx: 30,
targetFill: 0.3,
},
input: {
anchorPoint: { x: 0.5, y: 0.8 }, // Bottom of screen
paddingPx: 20,
targetFill: 0.9,
},
header: {
anchorPoint: { x: 0.5, y: 0.15 }, // Top of screen
paddingPx: 10,
targetFill: 0.9,
},
profile: {
anchorPoint: { x: 0.2, y: 0.15 }, // Left-ish in header
paddingPx: 50,
targetFill: 0.4,
},
};

// =============================================================================
// ANCHOR PROVIDER
// =============================================================================

/**
* THE ANCHOR PROVIDER
*
* This object is registered with the plugin and called by the camera system
* to resolve anchor names to actual screen coordinates.
*
* USAGE IN DSL:
* ```typescript
* b.at(1000).camera.focus("lastMessage"); // Camera focuses on last message
* b.at(2000).camera.focus("profile"); // Camera focuses on profile
* ```
*
* USAGE IN DIRECTOR:
* ```typescript
* // Auto-focus on new message
* if (event.type === "MESSAGE_RECEIVED") {
* return { type: "FOCUS", anchor: "lastMessage" };
* }
* ```
*/
export const {{ pascalCase name }}Anchors = {
appId: APP_ID,

/**
* Static framing definitions.
* Used to configure how each anchor type is framed.
*/
framing: ANCHOR_FRAMING,

/**
* Dynamic anchor extraction from layout state.
*
* Called by camera system to resolve anchors.
*/
getAnchors(
world: any,
layout: unknown,
deviceId: string
): { anchors: Record<string, any>; deviceId: string; appId: string } {
    const chatLayout = layout as ChatLayoutState;
    const anchors: Record<string, any> = {};

        // No layout? Return empty anchors
        if (!chatLayout?.semantic?.regions) {
        return { anchors: {}, deviceId, appId: APP_ID };
        }

        const regions = chatLayout.semantic.regions;

        // Map semantic regions to anchors
        for (const [key, region] of Object.entries(regions)) {
        anchors[key] = (region as any).rect;
        }

        // Computed aliases
        if (chatLayout.meta?.lastMessageId && regions[chatLayout.meta.lastMessageId]) {
        anchors["lastMessage"] = (regions[chatLayout.meta.lastMessageId] as any).rect;
        }

        return {
        anchors,
        deviceId,
        appId: APP_ID,
        };
        }
        };
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/runtime/reducer.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} Reducer
*
* Handles all {{ displayName }}-specific events.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import { TimelineEvent, WorldState } from "@tokovo/core";
import type { {{ pascalCase name }}Message, {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation, {{ pascalCase name }}State } from
"../types";

const APP_ID = "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";

// =============================================================================
// TYPE-SAFE ACCESSORS
// =============================================================================

function getConversations(draft: WorldState): Record<string, {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation> {
    return draft.conversations as Record<string, {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation>;
        }

        function getAppState(draft: WorldState): {{ pascalCase name }}State {
        if (!draft.appState) draft.appState = {};
        if (!draft.appState[APP_ID]) draft.appState[APP_ID] = {};
        return draft.appState[APP_ID] as {{ pascalCase name }}State;
        }

        // =============================================================================
        // REDUCER
        // =============================================================================

        /**
        * {{ displayName }} reducer - handles all app events.
        *
        * Add new event types as needed in the switch statement.
        */
        export function {{ camelCase name }}Reducer(draft: WorldState, event: TimelineEvent): void {
        if (event.kind !== "APP") return;

        const appEvent = event as TimelineEvent & {
        appId: string;
        conversationId?: string;
        from?: string;
        text?: string;
        payload?: Record<string, any>;
            };

            if (appEvent.appId !== APP_ID) return;

            const eventType = event.type as string;
            const conversationId = appEvent.conversationId;

            // Handle navigation events (no conversation required)
            if (eventType === "SCREEN_NAVIGATED") {
            const appState = getAppState(draft);
            appState.screen = (appEvent as any).screen || "chat";
            if (appEvent.conversationId) {
            appState.conversationId = appEvent.conversationId;
            }
            return;
            }

            if (!conversationId) return;

            const conversations = getConversations(draft);
            if (!conversations[conversationId]) {
            conversations[conversationId] = {
            id: conversationId,
            messages: [],
            };
            }
            const conversation = conversations[conversationId];

            switch (eventType) {
            case "MESSAGE_RECEIVED":
            case "MESSAGE_SENT": {
            const payload = appEvent.payload || {};
            const newMessage: {{ pascalCase name }}Message = {
            id: payload.messageId || `msg_${event.at}`,
            from: eventType === "MESSAGE_SENT" ? "me" : (payload.from || "unknown"),
            type: "text",
            text: payload.text || appEvent.text || "",
            at: event.at,
            status: eventType === "MESSAGE_SENT" ? "sent" : "delivered",
            };
            conversation.messages.push(newMessage);
            break;
            }

            case "TYPING_START": {
            if (!conversation.typing) conversation.typing = {};
            const actor = appEvent.payload?.actor || appEvent.from;
            if (actor) conversation.typing[actor] = true;
            break;
            }

            case "TYPING_END": {
            const actor = appEvent.payload?.actor || appEvent.from;
            if (conversation.typing && actor) {
            delete conversation.typing[actor];
            }
            break;
            }

            // Add more event handlers as needed
            }
            }
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/runtime/selectors.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} State Selectors
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import type { WorldState } from "@tokovo/core";
import type { {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation, {{ pascalCase name }}State } from "../types";

const APP_ID = "app_{{ snakeCase name }}";

export function selectAppState(world: WorldState): {{ pascalCase name }}State | undefined {
return world.appState?.[APP_ID] as {{ pascalCase name }}State | undefined;
}

export function selectConversations(world: WorldState): Record<string, {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation> {
    return (world.conversations ?? {}) as Record<string, {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation>;
        }

        export function selectCurrentConversation(world: WorldState): {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation | undefined {
        const convId = selectAppState(world)?.conversationId;
        if (!convId) return undefined;
        return selectConversations(world)[convId];
        }
````

/**
* {{ displayName }} Message Types
*
* All message-related type definitions.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

// =============================================================================
// MESSAGE TYPE ENUM
// =============================================================================

/**
* Supported message types for {{ displayName }}.
* Add more types as needed (e.g., "sticker", "poll", "location").
*/
export type {{ pascalCase name }}MessageType =
| "text"
| "image"
| "video"
| "voice"
| "system"
| "gif"
| "deleted";

// =============================================================================
// BASE MESSAGE
// =============================================================================

/**
* Base properties shared by all message types.
*/
export interface BaseMessage {
/** Unique message identifier */
id: string;
/** Sender ID ("me" for outgoing) */
from: string;
/** Display timestamp (e.g., "10:42") */
timestamp?: string;
/** Delivery status */
status?: "sending" | "sent" | "delivered" | "read";
/** Frame number when message appeared */
at?: number;
}

// =============================================================================
// SPECIFIC MESSAGE TYPES
// =============================================================================

export interface TextMessage extends BaseMessage {
type: "text";
text: string;
}

export interface ImageMessage extends BaseMessage {
type: "image";
imageUrl: string;
caption?: string;
}

export interface VideoMessage extends BaseMessage {
type: "video";
videoUrl: string;
thumbnailUrl?: string;
duration?: number;
caption?: string;
}

export interface VoiceMessage extends BaseMessage {
type: "voice";
duration: number;
isPlaying?: boolean;
playProgress?: number;
}

export interface GifMessage extends BaseMessage {
type: "gif";
gifUrl: string;
}

export interface SystemMessage extends BaseMessage {
type: "system";
text: string;
}

export interface DeletedMessage extends BaseMessage {
type: "deleted";
}

// =============================================================================
// DISCRIMINATED UNION
// =============================================================================

/**
* Full message type - use switch(msg.type) for type-safe handling.
*/
export type {{ pascalCase name }}Message =
| TextMessage
| ImageMessage
| VideoMessage
| VoiceMessage
| GifMessage
| SystemMessage
| DeletedMessage;
````

/**
* {{ displayName }} UI - Main View
*
* Placeholder component - implement full UI here.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import React from "react";

interface {{ pascalCase name }}ChatViewProps {
conversation: any;
world: any;
}

/**
* Main chat view component.
*
* TODO: Implement full UI with:
* - Header with contact info
* - Message list
* - Typing indicator
* - Input area
*/
export const {{ pascalCase name }}ChatView: React.FC<{{ pascalCase name }}ChatViewProps> = ({ conversation }) => {
    if (!conversation) {
    return (
    <div style=\{{ display: "flex" , alignItems: "center" , justifyContent: "center" , height: "100%" ,
        background: "{{ themeColor }}20" }}>
        <p>{{ displayName }} - No conversation selected</p>
    </div>
    );
    }

    return (
    <div style=\{{ display: "flex" , flexDirection: "column" , height: "100%" , background: "#f5f5f5" }}>
        {/* Header */}
        <div style=\{{ padding: "16px" , background: "{{ themeColor }}" , color: "white" }}>
            <h3 style=\{{ margin: 0 }}>{conversation.name || "Chat"}</h3>
        </div>

        {/* Messages */}
        <div style=\{{ flex: 1, overflow: "auto" , padding: "16px" }}>
            {conversation.messages?.map((msg: any) => (
            <div key={msg.id} style=\{{ padding: "8px 12px" , borderRadius: "12px" , marginBottom: "8px" ,
                maxWidth: "70%" , marginLeft: msg.from==="me" ? "auto" : "0" , background: msg.from==="me"
                ? "{{ themeColor }}" : "white" , color: msg.from==="me" ? "white" : "black" }}>
                {msg.text}
            </div>
            ))}
        </div>

        {/* Input */}
        <div style=\{{ padding: "12px" , background: "white" , borderTop: "1px solid #eee" }}>
            <input type="text" placeholder="Type a message..." style=\{{ width: "100%" , padding: "8px 12px" ,
                borderRadius: "20px" , border: "1px solid #ddd" }} />
        </div>
    </div>
    );
    };

/**
* {{ displayName }} Android Strategy
*
* Implements the UIStrategy interface for Android.
* Uses Material Design styling.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import React from "react";
import type {
UIStrategy,
HeaderProps,
MessageBubbleProps,
TypingIndicatorProps,
InputAreaProps,
UIThemeTokens,
} from "../strategy";
import { UIStrategyRegistry } from "../strategy";

// =============================================================================
// ANDROID THEME TOKENS
// =============================================================================

const androidTokens: UIThemeTokens = {
backgroundColor: "#EEEEEE",
bubbleMyBg: "{{ themeColor }}",
bubbleOtherBg: "#FFFFFF",
textColor: "#212121",
secondaryColor: "#757575",
accentColor: "{{ themeColor }}",
fontFamily: "'Roboto', 'Google Sans', sans-serif",
};

// =============================================================================
// ANDROID COMPONENTS
// =============================================================================

const AndroidHeader: React.FC<HeaderProps> = ({ conversation, safeAreaTop }) => (
    <div style=\{{ paddingTop: safeAreaTop, backgroundColor: androidTokens.accentColor, color: "#FFFFFF" , }}>
        <div style=\{{ height: 56, display: "flex" , alignItems: "center" , padding: "0 16px" , }}>
            <span style=\{{ fontSize: 24, marginRight: 24 }}>←</span>
            <div style=\{{ fontSize: 20, fontWeight: 500 }}>{conversation.name || "Chat"}</div>
        </div>
    </div>
    );

    const AndroidMessageBubble: React.FC<MessageBubbleProps> = ({
        message,
        isMe,
        isFirst,
        senderName,
        }) => {
        const bubbleBg = isMe ? androidTokens.bubbleMyBg : androidTokens.bubbleOtherBg;
        const textColor = isMe ? "#FFF" : "#212121";

        return (
        <div style=\{{ display: "flex" , justifyContent: isMe ? "flex-end" : "flex-start" , marginBottom: 4,
            padding: "0 16px" , }}>
            <div style=\{{ maxWidth: "75%" , padding: "8px 12px" , borderRadius: 8, borderTopLeftRadius: isMe ? 8 : 0,
                borderTopRightRadius: isMe ? 0 : 8, backgroundColor: bubbleBg, color: textColor, fontFamily:
                androidTokens.fontFamily, fontSize: 16, boxShadow: "0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)" , }}>
                {senderName && isFirst && !isMe && (
                <div style=\{{ fontSize: 12, color: androidTokens.accentColor, marginBottom: 4 }}>
                    {senderName}
                </div>
                )}
                {message.type === "text" ? message.text : `[${message.type}]`}
            </div>
        </div>
        );
        };

        const AndroidTypingIndicator: React.FC<TypingIndicatorProps> = ({ typingMembers }) => (
            <div style=\{{ padding: "8px 16px" }}>
                <span style=\{{ fontSize: 14, color: "#757575" }}>
                    {typingMembers.length > 0
                    ? `${typingMembers.map(m => m.name).join(", ")} is typing...`
                    : "Typing..."}
                </span>
            </div>
            );

            const AndroidInputArea: React.FC<InputAreaProps> = ({ text, showCursor, safeAreaBottom }) => (
                <div style=\{{ padding: "8px 16px" , paddingBottom: 8 + safeAreaBottom, backgroundColor: "#FFFFFF" ,
                    display: "flex" , alignItems: "center" , gap: 16, }}>
                    <div style=\{{ flex: 1, padding: "12px 16px" , borderRadius: 24, border: "1px solid #E0E0E0" ,
                        fontSize: 16, fontFamily: androidTokens.fontFamily, }}>
                        {text || <span style=\{{ color: "#9E9E9E" }}>Type a message</span>}
                    </div>
                    <button style=\{{ width: 48, height: 48, borderRadius: 24, backgroundColor:
                        androidTokens.accentColor, border: "none" , color: "#FFF" , fontSize: 20, }}>
                        ➤
                    </button>
                </div>
                );

                // =============================================================================
                // STRATEGY EXPORT
                // =============================================================================

                export const {{ pascalCase name }}AndroidStrategy: UIStrategy = {
                id: "{{ kebabCase name }}-android",
                name: "{{ displayName }} Android",
                platform: "android",

                Header: AndroidHeader,
                MessageBubble: AndroidMessageBubble,
                TypingIndicator: AndroidTypingIndicator,
                InputArea: AndroidInputArea,

                tokens: androidTokens,
                };

                UIStrategyRegistry.register({{ pascalCase name }}AndroidStrategy);
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/views/ios/strategy.tsx.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} iOS Strategy
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* WHAT THIS FILE DOES
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* Implements the UIStrategy interface for iOS.
* Provides iOS-native styled components using Apple's HIG.
*
* COMPONENTS PROVIDED:
* - Header: iOS-style navigation bar with back arrow
* - MessageBubble: Rounded bubbles with iOS styling
* - TypingIndicator: Three-dot animation
* - InputArea: iOS text field with send button
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* HOW TO CUSTOMIZE
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* 1. Edit the components below for iOS-specific styling
* 2. Adjust the `tokens` object for colors
* 3. Register strategy in ./index.ts
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import React from "react";
import type {
UIStrategy,
HeaderProps,
MessageBubbleProps,
TypingIndicatorProps,
InputAreaProps,
UIThemeTokens,
} from "../strategy";
import { UIStrategyRegistry } from "../strategy";

// =============================================================================
// iOS THEME TOKENS
// =============================================================================

const iosTokens: UIThemeTokens = {
backgroundColor: "#F5F5F5",
bubbleMyBg: "{{ themeColor }}",
bubbleOtherBg: "#FFFFFF",
textColor: "#000000",
secondaryColor: "#8E8E93",
accentColor: "{{ themeColor }}",
fontFamily: "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', sans-serif",
};

// =============================================================================
// iOS COMPONENTS
// =============================================================================

/**
* iOS-style Header
*
* Features:
* - Back arrow (chevron.left)
* - Avatar
* - Contact name + status
*/
const IOSHeader: React.FC<HeaderProps> = ({ conversation, safeAreaTop }) => (
    <div style=\{{ paddingTop: safeAreaTop, backgroundColor: iosTokens.backgroundColor,
        borderBottom: "1px solid #E5E5E5" , }}>
        <div style=\{{ height: 44, display: "flex" , alignItems: "center" , padding: "0 16px" , }}>
            <span style=\{{ color: iosTokens.accentColor, fontSize: 17 }}>‹ Back</span>
            <div style=\{{ flex: 1, textAlign: "center" }}>
                <div style=\{{ fontSize: 17, fontWeight: 600 }}>{conversation.name || "Chat"}</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    );

    /**
    * iOS-style Message Bubble
    *
    * Features:
    * - Rounded corners (18px)
    * - Tail on first/last message
    * - Sender name in groups
    */
    const IOSMessageBubble: React.FC<MessageBubbleProps> = ({
        message,
        isMe,
        isFirst,
        isLast,
        senderName,
        }) => {
        const bubbleBg = isMe ? iosTokens.bubbleMyBg : iosTokens.bubbleOtherBg;
        const textColor = isMe ? "#FFF" : "#000";

        return (
        <div style=\{{ display: "flex" , justifyContent: isMe ? "flex-end" : "flex-start" , marginBottom: 2,
            padding: "0 16px" , }}>
            <div style=\{{ maxWidth: "75%" , padding: "8px 12px" , borderRadius: 18, backgroundColor: bubbleBg, color:
                textColor, fontFamily: iosTokens.fontFamily, fontSize: 17, }}>
                {senderName && isFirst && !isMe && (
                <div style=\{{ fontSize: 13, color: iosTokens.accentColor, marginBottom: 2 }}>
                    {senderName}
                </div>
                )}
                {message.type === "text" ? message.text : `[${message.type}]`}
            </div>
        </div>
        );
        };

        /**
        * iOS-style Typing Indicator
        */
        const IOSTypingIndicator: React.FC<TypingIndicatorProps> = ({ typingMembers }) => (
            <div style=\{{ padding: "8px 16px" , display: "flex" , alignItems: "center" }}>
                <div style=\{{ padding: "10px 14px" , borderRadius: 18, backgroundColor: "#FFF" , }}>
                    <span style=\{{ fontSize: 17, color: "#666" }}>• • •</span>
                </div>
                {typingMembers.length > 0 && (
                <span style=\{{ marginLeft: 8, fontSize: 13, color: "#666" }}>
                    {typingMembers.map(m => m.name).join(", ")} typing...
                </span>
                )}
            </div>
            );

            /**
            * iOS-style Input Area
            */
            const IOSInputArea: React.FC<InputAreaProps> = ({ text, showCursor, safeAreaBottom }) => (
                <div style=\{{ padding: "8px 16px" , paddingBottom: 8 + safeAreaBottom, backgroundColor: "#FFF" ,
                    borderTop: "1px solid #E5E5E5" , display: "flex" , alignItems: "center" , gap: 8, }}>
                    <div style=\{{ flex: 1, padding: "8px 12px" , borderRadius: 20, backgroundColor: "#F0F0F0" ,
                        fontSize: 17, fontFamily: iosTokens.fontFamily, minHeight: 36, }}>
                        {text || <span style=\{{ color: "#8E8E93" }}>Message</span>}
                        {showCursor && <span style=\{{ borderRight: "2px solid #007AFF" }} />}
                    </div>
                    <button style=\{{ width: 32, height: 32, borderRadius: 16, backgroundColor: iosTokens.accentColor,
                        border: "none" , color: "#FFF" , fontSize: 16, }}>
                        ↑
                    </button>
                </div>
                );

                // =============================================================================
                // STRATEGY EXPORT
                // =============================================================================

                export const {{ pascalCase name }}IosStrategy: UIStrategy = {
                id: "{{ kebabCase name }}-ios",
                name: "{{ displayName }} iOS",
                platform: "ios",

                Header: IOSHeader,
                MessageBubble: IOSMessageBubble,
                TypingIndicator: IOSTypingIndicator,
                InputArea: IOSInputArea,

                tokens: iosTokens,
                };

                // Auto-register on import
                UIStrategyRegistry.register({{ pascalCase name }}IosStrategy);
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/views/strategy.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} UI Strategy Pattern
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* WHAT IS THE STRATEGY PATTERN?
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* The Strategy Pattern allows SWAPPABLE UI implementations while keeping
* the core logic unchanged. Think of it as "skins" for your app.
*
* EXAMPLE:
* - iOS Strategy: Rounded bubbles, SF Pro font, iOS styling
* - Android Strategy: Material Design bubbles, Roboto font
* - Ghibli Strategy: Hand-drawn style, custom animations
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* HOW IT WORKS
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* 1. Define a common interface (UIStrategy)
* 2. Each platform implements the interface
* 3. Screens use the Registry to get the right strategy
* 4. Components render without knowing which platform they're on
*
* ```typescript
* // In a Screen component:
* const strategy = UIStrategyRegistry.forPlatform("ios");
* const { Header, MessageBubble, InputArea } = strategy;
*
* return (
* <>
    *
    <Header conversation={conv} />
    * {messages.map(m =>
    <MessageBubble message={m} />)}
    *
    <InputArea text={draft} />
    *
</>
* );
* ```
*
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
* WHY USE THIS IN TOKOVO?
* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
*
* 1. DSL AGNOSTIC: DSL events don't know about UI. They produce state.
* 2. MULTI-PLATFORM: Same episode renders differently on iOS vs Android.
* 3. THEME EXTENSIBILITY: Add custom themes without changing core code.
* 4. TESTING: Swap to a "mock" strategy for testing.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

import React from "react";
import type { {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation, {{ pascalCase name }}Message } from "../types";

// =============================================================================
// COMPONENT PROP INTERFACES
// =============================================================================

/**
* Props for the Header component.
* Platform strategies map these to native styling.
*/
export interface HeaderProps {
conversation: {{ pascalCase name }}Conversation;
safeAreaTop: number;
onBack?: () => void;
}

/**
* Props for the MessageBubble component.
*/
export interface MessageBubbleProps {
message: {{ pascalCase name }}Message;
isMe: boolean;
isFirst: boolean; // First in a sender's run
isLast: boolean; // Last in a sender's run
isGroupChat?: boolean;
senderName?: string;
senderColor?: string;
}

/**
* Props for the TypingIndicator component.
*/
export interface TypingIndicatorProps {
typingMembers: Array<{ id: string; name: string }>;
    isGroupChat: boolean;
    }

    /**
    * Props for the InputArea component.
    */
    export interface InputAreaProps {
    text: string;
    showCursor: boolean;
    safeAreaBottom: number;
    }

    // =============================================================================
    // THEME TOKENS
    // =============================================================================

    /**
    * Visual tokens for consistent styling.
    * Each strategy provides its own tokens.
    */
    export interface UIThemeTokens {
    backgroundColor: string;
    bubbleMyBg: string;
    bubbleOtherBg: string;
    textColor: string;
    secondaryColor: string;
    accentColor: string;
    fontFamily: string;
    }

    // =============================================================================
    // STRATEGY INTERFACE
    // =============================================================================

    /**
    * THE UI STRATEGY CONTRACT
    *
    * Every platform (iOS, Android, custom themes) must implement this.
    * This ensures all required components exist and accept the right props.
    */
    export interface UIStrategy {
    /** Unique identifier, e.g., "{{ kebabCase name }}-ios" */
    id: string;

    /** Display name, e.g., "{{ displayName }} iOS" */
    name: string;

    /** Platform target */
    platform: "ios" | "android" | "custom";

    // === REQUIRED COMPONENTS ===
    Header: React.FC<HeaderProps>;
        MessageBubble: React.FC<MessageBubbleProps>;
            TypingIndicator: React.FC<TypingIndicatorProps>;
                InputArea: React.FC<InputAreaProps>;

                    // === OPTIONAL COMPONENTS ===
                    MessageList?: React.FC<any>;
                        SystemMessage?: React.FC<any>;

                            // === TOKENS ===
                            tokens: UIThemeTokens;
                            }

                            // =============================================================================
                            // STRATEGY REGISTRY
                            // =============================================================================

                            const strategies: Map<string, UIStrategy> = new Map();

                                /**
                                * THE UI STRATEGY REGISTRY
                                *
                                * A global registry that stores all registered strategies.
                                *
                                * USAGE:
                                * ```typescript
                                * // Register (done automatically on import)
                                * UIStrategyRegistry.register(IOSStrategy);
                                *
                                * // Get by ID
                                * const strategy = UIStrategyRegistry.get("{{ kebabCase name }}-ios");
                                *
                                * // Get for platform
                                * const strategy = UIStrategyRegistry.forPlatform("android");
                                * ```
                                */
                                export const UIStrategyRegistry = {
                                /**
                                * Register a new strategy.
                                */
                                register(strategy: UIStrategy): void {
                                strategies.set(strategy.id, strategy);
                                console.log(`[UIStrategy] Registered: ${strategy.id} (${strategy.name})`);
                                },

                                /**
                                * Get strategy by ID.
                                */
                                get(id: string): UIStrategy | undefined {
                                return strategies.get(id);
                                },

                                /**
                                * Get strategy or throw.
                                */
                                require(id: string): UIStrategy {
                                const strategy = strategies.get(id);
                                if (!strategy) {
                                throw new Error(`UI Strategy not found: ${id}. Available:
                                ${Array.from(strategies.keys()).join(", ")}`);
                                }
                                return strategy;
                                },

                                /**
                                * List all registered strategy IDs.
                                */
                                list(): string[] {
                                return Array.from(strategies.keys());
                                },

                                /**
                                * Get default strategy for platform.
                                * Falls back to iOS if Android not available.
                                */
                                forPlatform(platform: "ios" | "android"): UIStrategy {
                                const id = platform === "ios" ? "{{ kebabCase name }}-ios" : "{{ kebabCase name
                                }}-android";
                                let strategy = strategies.get(id);

                                // Fallback to iOS if Android not registered
                                if (!strategy && platform === "android") {
                                strategy = strategies.get("{{ kebabCase name }}-ios");
                                }

                                if (!strategy) {
                                throw new Error(`No UI strategy registered for platform: ${platform}`);
                                }

                                return strategy;
                                }
                                };
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/index.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} Package - Public API
*
* This is the main entry point for the {{ displayName }} plugin.
* All exports follow the Enterprise Gold Standard structure.
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*/

// =============================================================================
// PLUGIN (Primary Export)
// =============================================================================

export {
{{ pascalCase name }}Plugin,
register{{ pascalCase name }}Plugin,
type {{ pascalCase name }}DslApi,
} from "./plugin";

// =============================================================================
// TYPES
// =============================================================================

export * from "./types";

// =============================================================================
// RUNTIME
// =============================================================================

export {
{{ camelCase name }}Reducer,
create{{ pascalCase name }}InitialState,
selectAppState,
selectConversations,
selectCurrentConversation,
} from "./runtime";

// =============================================================================
// VIEWS
// =============================================================================

export * from "./ui";

// =============================================================================
// IR (Intermediate Representation)
// =============================================================================

export type { {{ pascalCase name }}Payloads, {{ pascalCase name }}TrackEvent } from "./ir";
export { is{{ pascalCase name }}Event } from "./ir";

// =============================================================================
// LOWERING
// =============================================================================

export { {{ camelCase name }}V2Lowering } from "./lowering";

// =============================================================================
// DSL
// =============================================================================

export {
{{ camelCase name }}Dsl,
{{ pascalCase name }}TrackBuilder,
create{{ pascalCase name }}TrackBuilder,
} from "./dsl";

// =============================================================================
// LAYOUT
// =============================================================================

export { computeChatLayout } from "./layout";

// =============================================================================
// CAMERA
// =============================================================================

export { {{ pascalCase name }}Director, {{ pascalCase name }}Behavior } from "./camera";

// =============================================================================
// ASSETS
// =============================================================================

export { {{ camelCase name }}AudioRules } from "./assets/audio-rules";

// =============================================================================
// SIDE EFFECTS (Auto-registration)
// =============================================================================

import "./ui/strategies";
import { AutoSoundRegistry, AppMetadataRegistry } from "@tokovo/core";
import { {{ camelCase name }}AudioRules } from "./assets/audio-rules";

// Auto-register audio rules when this module is imported
AutoSoundRegistry.register({{ camelCase name }}AudioRules);

// Self-register app metadata
AppMetadataRegistry.register("app_{{ snakeCase name }}", {
displayName: "{{ displayName }}",
themeColor: "{{ themeColor }}",
icon: "{{ icon }}",
viewStrategy: "CHAT",
});

// =============================================================================
// DEFAULT
// =============================================================================

export { default } from "./plugin";
````

## File: turbo/generators/plugin/templates/src/plugin.ts.hbs
````
/**
* {{ displayName }} Plugin - Enterprise Contract
*
* Self-contained plugin with all tiers:
* - Tier A: id, version, displayName, reducer, views
* - Tier B: lowering handler, layouts
* - Tier C: DSL extension (b.use() pattern)
*
* Generated by: npx turbo gen plugin
*
* @see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md
*/

import { APP_IDS, PluginManager } from "@tokovo/core";
import type { TokovoPluginContract, PluginViews } from "@tokovo/core/src/types/plugin-contract";

// Runtime Layer
import { {{ camelCase name }}Reducer } from "./runtime/reducer";
import { create{{ pascalCase name }}InitialState } from "./runtime/initial-state";

// Views Layer
import { {{ pascalCase name }}ChatView } from "./ui";

// Lowering Layer (V2 is default)
import { {{ camelCase name }}V2Lowering } from "./lowering";

// DSL Layer
import { {{ camelCase name }}Dsl, type {{ pascalCase name }}DslApi } from "./dsl";

// Layout Layer
import { computeChatLayout } from "./layout";

// Assets
import { {{ camelCase name }}AudioRules } from "./assets/audio-rules";

// Camera
import { {{ pascalCase name }}Behavior } from "./camera";

// =============================================================================
// PLUGIN VIEWS
// =============================================================================

/**
* View components for different platforms.
*
* The AppRoot is the main component rendered when this app is active.
* Platform strategies allow iOS/Android specific implementations.
*/
const {{ camelCase name }}Views: PluginViews = {
// Main app view - rendered when app is active
AppRoot: {{ pascalCase name }}ChatView as React.FC<any>,

    // Platform-specific strategies
    strategies: {
    ios: {
    ChatScreen: {{ pascalCase name }}ChatView as React.FC<any>,
        },
        // Add Android when ready
        // android: { ... }
        },
        };

        // =============================================================================
        // PLUGIN ASSETS
        // =============================================================================

        /**
        * Static assets like sounds and icons.
        *
        * Sounds are registered with SoundRegistry on plugin load.
        * Paths are relative to public/audio/ directory.
        */
        const {{ camelCase name }}Assets = {
        sounds: {
        "message_in": "plugins/{{ kebabCase name }}/received.wav",
        "message_out": "plugins/{{ kebabCase name }}/sent.wav",
        "notification": "plugins/{{ kebabCase name }}/notification.wav",
        },
        icons: {
        "app_icon": "/icons/{{ kebabCase name }}.svg",
        },
        };

        // =============================================================================
        // ENTERPRISE PLUGIN CONTRACT
        // =============================================================================

        /**
        * The main plugin contract.
        *
        * This object is registered with PluginManager and provides all
        * functionality needed to simulate {{ displayName }}.
        *
        * Implements TokovoPluginContract<"app_{{ snakeCase name }}">
            */
            export const {{ pascalCase name }}Plugin: TokovoPluginContract<"app_{{ snakeCase name }}"> = {
                // === TIER A: Identity ===
                id: "app_{{ snakeCase name }}" as const,
                version: "1.0.0",
                displayName: "{{ displayName }}",

                // === TIER A: Runtime ===
                reducer: {{ camelCase name }}Reducer as any,
                views: {{ camelCase name }}Views,
                createInitialState: create{{ pascalCase name }}InitialState,

                // === TIER A: Assets ===
                assets: {{ camelCase name }}Assets,
                audioRules: {{ camelCase name }}AudioRules as any,

                // === TIER B: Lowering ===
                v2Lowering: {{ camelCase name }}V2Lowering,

                // === TIER B: Layouts ===
                layouts: [
                {
                viewKind: "CHAT",
                computeLayout: computeChatLayout as any,
                },
                ],

                // === TIER B: Behaviors ===
                behaviors: {{ pascalCase name }}Behavior,

                // === TIER C: DSL ===
                dsl: {{ camelCase name }}Dsl,
                };

                // =============================================================================
                // EXPORTS
                // =============================================================================

                /**
                * Register the plugin with PluginManager.
                * Call this in your app's initialization code.
                */
                export function register{{ pascalCase name }}Plugin(): void {
                PluginManager.register({{ pascalCase name }}Plugin as any);
                }

                export type { {{ pascalCase name }}DslApi };
                export default {{ pascalCase name }}Plugin;
````
